import {useState} from 'react'; import swal from "sweetalert"; const Myregister = () =>{ let [name, pickname] = useState(""); let [mobile, pickmobile] = useState(""); let [email, pickemail] = useState(""); let [password, pickpassword] = useState(""); let [gender, pickgender] = useState(""); let [source, picksource] = useState(""); const save = () =>{ let url = "http://localhost:1234/account"; let sellerdata = { sname: name, smobile : mobile, semail : email, spassword : password, sgender : gender, ssource : source } let postdata = { headers : {'Content-type' : 'application/json'}, method: "POST", body : JSON.stringify(sellerdata) } fetch(url, postdata) .then(responsedata => responsedata.json()) .then(data => { swal("Account Created Successfully !!", "", "success"); window.location.href = "http://localhost:3000/#/login"; }) } return(

Create New Account

pickname(obj.target.value)} value={name}/>
pickemail(obj.target.value)}/>
pickmobile(obj.target.value)}/>
pickpassword(obj.target.value)}/>
picksource(obj.target.value)}/>Linkedin picksource(obj.target.value)}/>Friends picksource(obj.target.value)}/>Job Portal picksource(obj.target.value)}/>Others
) } export default Myregister;
